_note: Semantic palette derived from the p(Doom)1 game's shipped art (amber-dominant CRT with a teal counterpoint over warm near-black). Key names are load-bearing: 8 pages read them at runtime via a fetch('/design/tokens.json') loader and map colors.* -> --bg-primary/--accent-primary/etc. Do not rename keys without updating those loaders. Green is demoted from brand chrome to 'phosphor', reserved for OK-state and terminal flourish, matching godot/scripts/ui/terminal_theme.gd (amber = PLAN register, green = WATCH register).
